'''thomadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombieproof|zombieproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombieproof|zombieproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thomadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomadithi|thomadithi]] || [[word:thomadiji|thomadiji]] || [[word:thomadishi|thomadishi]] || [[word:thomadiki|thomadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomaduthuthu|thomaduthuthu]] || [[word:thomadujuju|thomadujuju]] || [[word:thomadushushu|thomadushushu]] || [[word:thomadukuku|thomadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomaduthu|thomaduthu]] || [[word:thomaduju|thomaduju]] || [[word:thomadushu|thomadushu]] || [[word:thomaduku|thomaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadufthuf|thomadufthuf]] || [[word:thomadufjuf|thomadufjuf]] || [[word:thomadufshuf|thomadufshuf]] || [[word:thomadufkuf|thomadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomadethe|thomadethe]] || [[word:thomadeje|thomadeje]] || [[word:thomadeshe|thomadeshe]] || [[word:thomadeke|thomadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomadothotho|thomadothotho]] || [[word:thomadojojo|thomadojojo]] || [[word:thomadoshosho|thomadoshosho]] || [[word:thomadokoko|thomadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomadotho|thomadotho]] || [[word:thomadojo|thomadojo]] || [[word:thomadosho|thomadosho]] || [[word:thomadoko|thomadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadofthof|thomadofthof]] || [[word:thomadofjof|thomadofjof]] || [[word:thomadofshof|thomadofshof]] || [[word:thomadofkof|thomadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomadïfthïf|thomadïfthïf]] || [[word:thomadïfjïf|thomadïfjïf]] || [[word:thomadïfshïf|thomadïfshïf]] || [[word:thomadïfkïf|thomadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomadïfthïfthïf|thomadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thomadïfjïfjïf|thomadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thomadïfshïfshïf|thomadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thomadïfkïfkïf|thomadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomadïfthïf|thomadïfthïf]] || [[word:thomadïfjïf|thomadïfjïf]] || [[word:thomadïfshïf|thomadïfshïf]] || [[word:thomadïfkïf|thomadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadïfthïf|thomadïfthïf]] || [[word:thomadïfjïf|thomadïfjïf]] || [[word:thomadïfshïf|thomadïfshïf]] || [[word:thomadïfkïf|thomadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomadæthæ|thomadæthæ]] || [[word:thomadæjæ|thomadæjæ]] || [[word:thomadæshæ|thomadæshæ]] || [[word:thomadækæ|thomadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomadathatha|thomadathatha]] || [[word:thomadajaja|thomadajaja]] || [[word:thomadashasha|thomadashasha]] || [[word:thomadakaka|thomadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomadatha|thomadatha]] || [[word:thomadaja|thomadaja]] || [[word:thomadasha|thomadasha]] || [[word:thomadaka|thomadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadafthaf|thomadafthaf]] || [[word:thomadafjaf|thomadafjaf]] || [[word:thomadafshaf|thomadafshaf]] || [[word:thomadafkaf|thomadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thomadasha|thomadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomadshësha|thomadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomadrosha|thomadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomadmusha|thomadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomadyasha|thomadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomadnkshësha|gothomadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomadnkrosha|gothomadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomadnkmusha|gothomadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomadnkyasha|gothomadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thomamadasha|thomamadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomamadshësha|thomamadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomamadrosha|thomamadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomamadmusha|thomamadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomamadyasha|thomamadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomamadnkshësha|gothomamadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomamadnkrosha|gothomamadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomamadnkmusha|gothomamadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomamadnkyasha|gothomamadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:themædasha|themædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:themædshësha|themædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:themædrosha|themædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:themædmusha|themædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:themædyasha|themædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothemædnkshësha|gothemædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothemædnkrosha|gothemædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothemædnkmusha|gothemædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothemædnkyasha|gothemædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thomfadasha|thomfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomfadshësha|thomfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomfadrosha|thomfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomfadmusha|thomfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomfadyasha|thomfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomfadnkshësha|gothomfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomfadnkrosha|gothomfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomfadnkmusha|gothomfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomfadnkyasha|gothomfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
